description.en: Requirements for identifying the project, client, and planning group.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Project identification

description.en: The tender is for laboratory furniture for the Itzling laboratory building of the University of Salzburg, project number 1042.
description.original: Leistungsverzeichnis Labormöbel 30.10.15 Projekt : Laborgebäude Itzling der Universität Salzburg Projekt-Nr.: 1042

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Client identification

description.en: The client is the University of Salzburg.
description.original: Auftraggeber: Universität Salzburg

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Planning group identification

description.en: The planning group is Planungsgruppe Grünbichler GmbH, located at Wienerstraße 45a, 8605 Kapfenberg, with phone number +43 (3862) 28088.
description.original: Planungsgruppe Grünbichler GmbH, Wienerstraße 45a, 8605 Kapfenberg, +43 (3862) 28088

description.en: Requirements related to the physical structure of the document.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Document page count

description.original: Seite 1 von 409

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance

description.en: Requirements for adherence to analogous standards or rules.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Further requirements analogous to above

description.en: Further requirements are analogous to those specified above.
description.original: Weitere Anforderungen analog zu oben.

description.en: Logistics

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Delivery Scheduling

description.en: Requirements related to the timing and phasing of deliveries.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Staggered delivery required due to space constraints

description.en: Due to extreme space constraints on site, no intermediate storage outside the building is possible, and delivery must be staggered. All costs for staggered delivery must be included in unit prices. The space constraints must be taken into account during deliveries.
description.original: Eine gestaffelte Anlieferung ist deshalb unumgänglich, sämtliche hierfür erforderlichen Aufwendungen sind kalkulatorisch zu berücksichtigen und in den Einheitspreise entsprechend abzubilden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Storage

description.en: Requirements for on-site storage conditions and restrictions.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No intermediate storage outside building

description.en: No intermediate storage areas can be set up outside the building due to space constraints.
description.original: keine Zwischenlager außerhalb des Bebäudes errichtet werden können

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Transport Protection

description.en: Requirements for protecting items during transportation.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Protect pipe ends from contamination during transport

description.en: Pipe ends must be protected against contamination during transport.
description.original: Rohrenden sind beim Transport gegen Verunreinigungen zu schützen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Location Assignment

description.en: Requirements specifying the final placement or room assignment of items.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Room assignment: Postdoc I & II, 1st floor

description.en: The washbasin is to be installed in room 1.OG.16 (07.3/07.4) - Postdoc I & II, on the first floor.
description.original: 1.Obergeschoß Raum: 1.OG.16 (07.3/07.4) - Postdoc I & II

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Location: room 2.OG.07 (11.52.1) break room

description.en: The washbasin is to be installed in room 2.OG.07 (11.52.1) designated as break room (Aufenthalt).
description.original: Raum: 2.OG.07 (11.52.1) - Aufenthalt

description.en: Technical Specifications

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory Furniture

description.en: Requirements for laboratory furniture including workbenches, cabinets, and tabletops.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory furniture selection must consider different uses

description.en: The selection of individual furniture components must take into account the different uses of the laboratories (chemical labs, physics labs).
description.original: Die einzelnen Labore unterliegen unterschiedlichen Nutzungen (chemische Labore, Physiklabore), dieser Umstand ist in der Auswahl der einzelnen Möbelkomponenten berücksichtigt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Deliver single laboratory workstation (2.4 lfm) with specified components including sink

description.en: Deliver a single laboratory workstation (length 2.4 lfm) consisting of: support frame (2.4 lfm, H90, T75), media cell (2.4 lfm), under-counter cabinet with casters (1L2F, B120), under-counter cabinet fixed base (B60, 5L), table top stoneware composite (1.2 lfm), table top polypropylene (1.2 lfm), media channel with 6x 230V sockets, sink basin, gas fitting with fine regulating valve, and wall cabinet B120. Provide a sink measuring 50x40cm, including a drip tray and fittings, built into the tabletop.
description.original: Einzellaborarbeitszeile (Länge 2,4lfm), bestehend aus: 1 Stk. Traggestell, 2,4lfm, H90, T75 1 Stk. Medienzelle, 2,4lfm 1 Stk. Unterschrank, Korpus mit Rollen, 1L2F, B120 1 Stk. Unterschrank, Korpus Sockel fix, B60, 5L 1 Stk. Tischplatte Material Steinzeug- Verbund, 1,2lfm 1 Stk. Tischplatte Material Polypropylen, 1,2lfm 1 Stk. Medienkanal inkl. 6 Stk. 230V-Steckdosen 1 Stk. Trichterbecken 1 Stk. Gasarmatur inkl. Feinregulierventil 1 Stk. Oberschrank B120

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture suitable for isotope laboratory Type C

description.en: The offered furniture must be suitable for use in an isotope laboratory (Type C) located on the first basement level.
description.original: Im 1. Untergeschoss befindet sich ein Isotopenlabor bereich (Type C), die angebotenen Möbel müssen für diesen Einsatzzweck geeignet sein

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with ÖNORM standards for laboratory furniture

description.en: The tender requires compliance with ÖNORM standards: 12 912 for ceramic tiles for lab tables, 12 915 for built-in basins made of ceramic materials/sinks, 12 916 for large-format laboratory table tops made of clay ceramic materials, 12 922 for laboratory tables and table elements, 12 925 for safety cabinets for laboratories, and 12 926 for requirements for laboratory tables.
description.original: 12 912 Keramische Fliesen für Labortische

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fume hoods / exhausts and room control

description.original: Digestorien / Abzüge Laborraumregelung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sinks and Plumbing

description.en: Requirements for sinks and related plumbing fixtures.

description.en: Deliver a sink measuring 50x40cm.
description.original: Spüle, 50x40cm, inkl.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimum Requirements

description.en: General minimum requirements and execution descriptions.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Execution description as binding minimum requirements

description.en: The 'execution description' is binding as minimum requirements for all bidders. Non-fulfillment leads to exclusion of the offer.
description.original: Die 'Ausführungsbeschreibung' sind als Mindestanforderungen für alle Bieter bindend. Eine Nichterfüllung dieser Mindestanforderungen hat das Ausscheiden des Angebotes zur Folge.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Building Conditions

description.en: Requirements for building conditions such as ceilings and floors.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory rooms generally without suspended ceiling

description.en: The laboratory rooms are generally constructed without a suspended ceiling. Some rooms have a partial suspended ceiling at a height of 300 cm above finished floor level.
description.original: Die Laborräume sind generell ohne Zwischendecke ausgeführt. Einzelne Räume sind teilweise mit einer Zwischendecke (Höhe 300 cm ü. FFBOK = Fertige Fußbodenoberkante) ausgeführt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No suspended ceiling in some rooms

description.en: Some rooms are executed without a suspended ceiling. Individual rooms are partially executed with a suspended ceiling (height 300 cm above finished floor level).
description.original: ohne Zwischendecke aus geführt. Einzelne Räume sind teilweise mit einer Zwischendecke (Höhe 300 cm ü. FFBOK = Fertige Fußbodenoberkante) ausgeführt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Floor with skirting coves

description.en: All floors of the laboratory rooms are equipped with skirting coves (Sockelhochzüge). These coves are executed as coved bases, the height of each cove is approx. 100 mm.
description.original: Sämtliche Fußböden der Laborräume sind mit Sockelho chzügen ausgestattet. Diese Hochzüge sind als Hohlkehlen au sgeführt, die Höhe des einzelnen Hochzuges beträgt ca. 100mm.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture and Design

description.en: Requirements related to furniture modifications, aesthetics, modularity, and color.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cutouts in table tops for pipes without media cell

description.en: This concerns laboratory rows with and without media cell; in the latter case, appropriate cutouts must be provided in table tops, and the drain pipe between the top edge of the table top and the bottom edge of the wall cabinet must be concealed.
description.original: Di es betrifft Laborzeilen mit und ohne Medienzelle, im letzeren F all sind entsprechend Ausschnitte an Tischplatten vorzusehen, sowie das A bflussrohr zwischen OK Tischplatte und UK Oberschrank zu verblenden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Uniform and aesthetically pleasing design of laboratory furniture system

description.en: The laboratory furniture must have a uniform design, with each component reflecting its identity as part of the system. The overall appearance of the furniture (geometries, height and depth structures, joint patterns, handles, and colors) must be aesthetically pleasing and homogeneous.
description.original: Neben der geforderten Funktionalität muss die Laboreinrichtung ein einheitliches Design aufweisen. Es ist ein Laboreinrichtungssystem anzubieten. Jede der Einrichtungskomponenten muss den Erkennungswert als Bestandteil des Einrichtungssystems widerspiegeln.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory furniture system from industrial series production components

description.en: The laboratory furniture system must be built from components originating from industrial series production.
description.original: Das Labormöbelsystem ist aus Komponenten, welche einer industriellen Serienfertigung entspringen, aufzubauen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture components must be interchangeable and combinable

description.en: To enable extensive interchangeability, the laboratory furniture must be assembled from functional and combinable elements.
description.original: Um eine weitgehende Austauschbarkeit zu ermöglichen, sind die Laboreinrichtungen aus funktionsgerechten und kombinierbaren Elementen zusammenzustellen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Corner constructions must include panels

description.en: For corner constructions, panels must be provided regardless of whether they are specified in the performance description.
description.original: Dies gilt in besonderem Maße bei Eckverbauten – hier sind jedenfalls Blenden vorzusehen (unabhängig, ob diese in der Leistungsbeschreibung ggf.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Labormöbel in geforderter Qualität anbieten

description.en: Laboratory furniture must be offered in the quality specified in the tender, manufactured according to industrial standards and current state of the art.
description.original: Es sind Labormöbel in der in diesem LV geforderten Qualität anzubieten, diese sind nach Industriestandard und dem gegenwärtigen Stand der Technik entsprechend zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Komponenten hinsichtlich Energieeffizienz und Betriebskosten optimiert

description.en: Components must be offered that are optimized in terms of energy efficiency and operating costs.
description.original: Es sind Komponenten anzubieten, welche hinsichtlich Energieeffizienz und Betriebskosten optimiert sind.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Farbliche Ausführung nach Standard-Farbkarte des Herstellers

description.en: The color execution of the furniture must be offered and calculated according to the standard color chart of the laboratory furniture manufacturer.
description.original: Anzubieten und einzukalkulieren ist die farbliche Ausführung der Möbel nach der Standard-Farbkarte des Labormöbelherstellers.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Farbe wird vom Auftraggeber frei gewählt

description.en: The client freely chooses the color from the standard color chart; for the entire delivery scope, only one color per furniture component (e.g., front) is selected.
description.original: Aus dieser Farbkarte wird die entsprechende Farbe durch den Auftraggeber (AG) frei gewählt, wobei für den gesamten Lieferumfang pro Möbelkomponente (z.B. Möbelfront) nur eine Farbe gewählt wird.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Submit tabletop materials, fronts, bases, and color description

description.en: The tender must include materials for tabletops, fronts, bases, and a description of the color scheme for other furniture components.
description.original: Tischplattenmaterialien, Fronten, Sockel, etc. sind dem Angebot beizulegen, ebenso eine Beschreibung der Farbgebung der weiteren Möbelkomponenten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture base color must be black

description.en: The specified color for the furniture base is black.
description.original: Vorgabe Farbe Möbelsockel: schwarz!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cable routing color matches support frame, white if on wall

description.en: The color of the cable routing must match that of the support frame, except if it runs along the wall, then it must be white until it enters the lab furniture.
description.original: Die Farbgebung dieser Kabelführung hat jener des Traggestells zu entsprechen (Ausnahme: verläuft diese Kabelführung an der Wand, so ist diese bis zur Einleitung in das Labormöbel weiß auszuführen).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No bent supply lines allowed in visible area

description.en: No bent supply lines are permitted in the visible area.
description.original: im Sichtbereich sind keine gekröpften Zuleitungen zulässig

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media Cells and Frames

description.en: Requirements for media cells, frames, and their adaptation to outlets.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells and frame constructions must be adapted to existing outlets

description.en: Media cells and frame constructions must be adapted and executed according to the existing outlets. Frame elements must be positioned so they do not lie on or in front of media outlets.
description.original: Die Medienzellen und Ständerkonstruktionen sind entsprechend den ausgeführten Auslässen anzupassen und auszuführen. Ständerelemente, etc. sind so zu positionieren, dass diese nicht auf bzw. vor Medienauslässen zu liegen kommen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells to have as few joints as possible

description.en: Media cells shall be executed with as few joints as possible.
description.original: Medienzellen sollen mit möglichst wenigen Stoßstellen ausgeführt werden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells may extend beyond under and upper cabinets

description.en: Media cells may extend beyond the dimensions of under and upper cabinets.
description.original: und dürfen auch über die Abmessungen von Unter- und Oberschränken hinausgehen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Flexibility in arrangement of shelves must be maintained

description.en: Flexibility in the arrangement of shelves, etc. must be ensured.
description.original: Jedoch muss die Flexibilität in der Anordnung von Tablaren, etc. gewährleistet bleiben

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: On-site outlets come from floor, wall, or ceiling

description.en: The on-site outlets are from the floor, the wall, or the ceiling.
description.original: Die bauseitigen Auslässe erfolgen vom Boden, aus der Wand oder von der Decke

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Materials and Construction

description.en: Requirements for materials used in furniture, fume hoods, and other components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipe material: see position 'Gasversorgung'

description.en: Pipe material: see position 'Gasversorgung' (gas supply).
description.original: Leitungsmaterial: siehe Position 'Gasversorgung'

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Multi-layer flat pressed boards with coating class 2 for modules and panels

description.en: Multi-layer flat pressed boards must be used as panel material for modules, fascias, back walls, and similar components. Boards must be coated on both sides with coating class 2 (coating thickness >0.14mm).
description.original: Als Plattenmaterial für diese Module sind mehrschichtige Flachpressplatten zu verwenden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Metal construction from standard profiles

description.en: Metal constructions must be made from commercially formed, standard-coated metal tubes or support profiles.
description.original: Metallkonstruktionen sind aus handelsüblich geformten, normgerecht beschichteten Metallrohren bzw. Trägerprofilen herzustellen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table top material per 'Tischplatte' item or plans

description.en: The table top material must be as specified in the 'Tischplatte' item or according to the plans.
description.original: Tischplatte (Material entsprechend Position "Tischplatte" bzw. lt. Angaben in den Plänen)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Material: kunststoffbeschichtete Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte 19mm

description.en: The shelves and bottom must be made of 19mm thick melamine resin flat pressed board, plastic-coated on both sides, according to DIN 68 765 (abrasion resistance S, coating class 2, coating >0.14mm, emission class E1).
description.original: Diese sind aus beidseitig kunststoffbeschichteter, 19mm dicker Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte, nach DIN 68 765 (Abriebwiderstand S, Beschichtungsklasse 2 Beschichtung größer 0,14mm Emissionsklasse E1) zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fachböden und unterer Boden ab Rasterbreite >600mm aus OSB-Platte 22mm

description.en: Shelves and lower bottom must be made of directly coated OSB board (22mm thick) for grid widths greater than 600mm.
description.original: Fachböden und unterer Boden sind ab einer Rasterbreite > 600mm aus direkt beschichteter OSB-Platte (22mm dick) auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawer frame from powder-coated steel 1.0mm

description.en: The drawer frame must be made of powder-coated steel with a material thickness of 1.0mm.
description.original: Die Zarge der Schubladen ist aus pulverbeschichtetem Stahl (1,0mm Materialstärke) zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawer back and bottom from melamine resin board 16mm

description.en: The back and bottom of the drawers must be made of double-sided plastic-coated melamine resin flat press board, 16mm thick, according to DIN 68765.
description.original: Die Rückseite und der Boden der Schubladen sind aus beidseitig kunststoffbeschichteter Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte, 16mm dick, nach DIN 68765 zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet body, back panel, and shelves material

description.en: The cabinet body must be made of 19mm thick, double-sided plastic-coated melamine resin chipboard according to DIN 68 765 (abrasion resistance S, coating class 2, coating >0.14mm, emission class E1). The back panel must be a 4mm thick, double-sided lacquered MDF board, grooved and glued. For grid widths greater than 600mm, shelves and bottom panel must be made of 22mm thick directly coated OSB board.
description.original: Er ist zu fertigen aus beidseitig kunststoffbeschichteter Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte, 19mm dick, nach DIN 68 765 (Abriebwiderstand S, Beschichtungsklasse 2 Beschichtung größer 0,14mm Emissionsklasse E1).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Base plinth material: at least 16mm waterproof plywood per DIN 68765

description.en: The base plinth must be made of at least 16mm thick, waterproof glued plywood according to DIN 68765.
description.original: komplett aus mindestens 16mm dickem, wasserfest verleimten Sperrholz nach DIN 68 765 zu fertigen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Material for cabinet and shelf doors

description.en: Doors must be made of stainless steel material.
description.original: Material Edelstahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelf board material and thickness

description.en: Shelves and bottom boards for grid widths from 600mm must be made of direct-coated OSB board at least 22mm thick including coating.
description.original: Fachböden und unterer Boden sind ab einer Rasterbreite von 600mm aus direktbeschichteter OSB-Platte (mind. 22mm dick inkl. Beschichtung) auszuführen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Metal shelf material options

description.en: Metal shelves must be executed according to the performance description, either in stainless steel or coated sheet steel.
description.original: Metallregale: Ausführung entsprechend der Leistungsbeschreibung, entweder in Edelstahl, oder Stahlblech beschichtet.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fume hood walls and lining materials

description.en: Side walls and rear wall must be made of 19mm chipboard, directly coated. The inner air guide wall must be made of 5mm phenolic resin solid core panels. Some fume hoods require additional lining in phenolic resin solid core or large-area stoneware as per item descriptions. In the phenolic resin solid core lining variant, both side walls must be completely made of this material.
description.original: Die Seitenwände und die Rückwand sind aus 19mm Spanplatte, direkt beschichtet, zu fertigen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fume hood front, lining, back wall, and inner air guide wall

description.en: The front side must be made of 19mm thick directly coated chipboard with control elements arranged on panels. The fume hoods must be offered with a lining (inner side) made of phenolic resin solid core. The back wall must be made of 19mm directly coated chipboard. The inner air guide wall must be made of 5mm solid core.
description.original: Panels angeordneten Bedienelementen vorzusehen. Die außen liegende Seite ist aus direkt beschichteter, 19mm dicker Spanplatte zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wash chamber and circulation pump materials

description.en: Wash chamber made of stainless steel. Circulation pump housing made of polypropylene (PP). Circulation pump impeller made of polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF). Inlet pipe made of stainless steel.
description.original: Spülraum aus Edelstahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connection hoses: fabric-reinforced

description.en: Connection hoses must be fabric-reinforced.
description.original: Verbindungsschläuche: gewebeverstärkt

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wash chamber material and thickness specified

description.en: Wash chamber material number and material thickness must be specified.
description.original: Spülraum (Werkstoffnummer/Materialstärke):

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All air-conducting parts made of PP

description.en: All air-conducting parts must be made of polypropylene (PP).
description.original: Sämtliche luftführenden Teile sind aus PP zu fertigen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Material for multiple outlet modules

description.en: All valve bodies must be made of brass Ms 58 and Ms 60, or stainless steel 1.4401 and 1.4571 if required, or polypropylene (PP) if required.
description.original: Sämtliche Körper der Armaturen sind grundsätzlich aus Messing Ms 58 und Ms 60 zu fertigen. Sofern gefordert sind Armaturen aus Edelstahl, Werkstoff Nr. 1.4401 und 1.4571 herzustellen. Kunststoffarmaturen sind sofern gefordert aus Polypropylen (PP) herzustellen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with ÖNORM for glass (1 259)

description.en: The tender requires compliance with ÖNORM standard 1 259 for glass.
description.original: 1 259 Glas

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with ÖNORM for wood-based materials (14 175, parts 1-7)

description.en: The tender requires compliance with ÖNORM standard 14 175, parts 1 to 7, for wood-based materials.
description.original: 14 175 Teil 1 bis Teil 7

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with ÖNORM for melamine-faced boards for interior use (14 322)

description.en: The tender requires compliance with ÖNORM standard 14 322 for wood-based materials - melamine-faced boards for interior use.
description.original: 14 322 Holzwerkstoffe - Melaminbesch. Platten zur Verwendung im Innenbereich

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with ÖNORM for decorative high-pressure laminates (16 926)

description.en: The tender requires compliance with ÖNORM standard 16 926 for decorative high-pressure laminates.
description.original: 16 926 Dekorative Schichtpressstoffplatten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Powder-coated aluminum tube with three flexible hose sections

description.en: The arm must have a powder-coated aluminum tube and three flexible hose sections.
description.original: Pulverbeschichtetes Aluminiumrohr, drei flexible Schlauchstücke

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical Supply and Components

description.en: Requirements for electrical supply, outlets, and related components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply for laboratory rows via 5x6mm² cable from building

description.en: Each laboratory row or group of laboratory rows must be electrically supplied with a 5x6mm² cable provided by the building side. The contractor must route this cable from the transfer point into the lab bench from above.
description.original: Jede Laborzeile bzw. jeder Laborzeilenverband wird elektrisch mit einem bauseitigen 5x6mm²-Kabel angespeist

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Emergency power supply with Schuko sockets in specified color

description.en: Some consumers are supplied via emergency power supply. A 5x6mm² cable ends analogously and must be routed by the lab furniture manufacturer to the connection terminals in the furniture. Schuko sockets connected to emergency power supply must be supplied in a color specified by the electrical contractor; coordination is the contractor's responsibility.
description.original: Elektroversorgung über Sicherheitsstromversorgung: Teilweise werden einzelne Verbraucher im Gebäude über eine Sicherheitsstromversorgung versorgt. Dazu endet analog zu oben beschrieben ein 5x6mm²- Kabel, welches vom Labormöbelhersteller in oben beschriebener Weise an die Anschlussklemmen im Möbel zu führen ist.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply from laboratory bench

description.en: The electrical supply of these channels comes from the corresponding laboratory bench.
description.original: Die elektrische Versorgung dieser Kanäle erfolgt über die entsprechende Laborzeile.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Single electrical supply point for multiple fume hoods or integrated in furniture row

description.en: If multiple fume hoods are arranged side by side or integrated into a laboratory furniture row, only one common electrical supply point is provided by the building side.
description.original: Sind mehrere Digestorien nebeneinander angeordnet, oder ist das Digestorium in einer Labormöbelzeile integriert, so ist bauseits nur ein gemeinsamer Elektro-Anspeisepunkt vorgesehen.

For sitting work height (approx. 750mm), division into 3 or 4 HE should be possible; for standing work height, division into 4 or 5 HE should be possible.

description.en: Components must be made of double-sided plastic-coated melamine resin flat press board, at least 19mm thick (including coating), according to DIN 68 765 (abrasion resistance S, coating class 2, coating at least 0.14mm, emission class E1).
description.original: Diese sind gefertigt aus beidseitig kunststoffbeschichteter Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte, mind. 19mm dick (inkl. Beschichtung), nach DIN 68 765 (Abriebwiderstand S, Beschichtungsklasse 2 Beschichtung mind. 0,14mm Emissionsklasse E1).

description.en: The extraction hood must be made of polypropylene (PP).
description.original: Material: PP

description.original: Becken aus Edelstahl: Material Werkst. Nr. 1.4301 Blechstärke mind. 1,0mm Rostfrei, korrosionsbeständig und desinfektionsmittelfest.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Inner body made of highly resistant melamine-coated special panels

description.en: The inner body must be made of highly resistant melamine resin-coated special panels.
description.original: Der Innenkorpus ist aus hochbeständigen melaminharzbeschichteten Spezialplatten zu fertigen

description.en: The transport cart must also serve as a drip tray made of polypropylene (PP).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Base plinth covered with waterproof plastic foil on both sides

description.en: The base plinth must be covered on both sides with waterproof, seamless plastic foil.
description.original: zweiseitig mit Kunststofffolie wasserfest und fugenlos belegt

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All edges treated with deep-penetrating liquid coating in color of adjacent surfaces

description.en: All edges, even in non-visible areas, must be treated with a deeply penetrating liquid coating in the color of the adjacent surfaces.
description.original: Generell müssen alle Kanten, auch in nicht sichtbaren Bereichen, mindestens mit einer stark eindringenden Flüssigkeitsbeschichtung in der Farbe der angrenzenden Oberflächen behandelt werden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Surface sanded both sides and treated with paraffin oil

description.en: The surface must be sanded on both sides and treated with paraffin oil.
description.original: Die Oberfläche ist beidseitig geschliffen und mit Paraffinöl eingelassen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Surface protection: sandblasting or chemical degreasing plus powder coating, average coating thickness 80 μm

description.en: Surface protection of steel parts must be realized by sandblasting or chemical degreasing, with powder coating (epoxy-polyester mixed powder) thermally hardened. The average coating thickness must be 80 μm.
description.original: Der Oberflächenschutz der Stahlteile ist durch Sandstrahlen oder chem. Entfettung, mit Pulverbeschichtung (Epoxy-Polyester Mischpulver) thermisch gehärtet zu realisieren.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Full coating of support frames with epoxy resin powder coating, grey RAL 7004 or similar

description.en: The support frames must be fully coated with epoxy resin powder coating, color grey according to RAL 7004 or similar, as per above specifications.
description.original: Die Traggestelle sind vollständig zu beschichten (siehe oben).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Splash guard coating thickness

description.en: The OSB board must be coated on both sides with a minimum thickness of 0.14 mm.
description.original: beidseitig in einer Stärke von mind. 0,14mm beschichtet.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plastic coating for all laboratory fittings with Safecoat option and no coating on media-carrying spaces and threads

description.en: All laboratory fittings must have a plastic coating that is UV-resistant, grippy, abrasion-resistant, dirt-repellent, chemically resistant, and temperature-resistant up to 120°C. Media-carrying spaces in the fittings and threads must not be coated. For particularly high corrosion resistance requirements, a Safecoat coating must be applied.
description.original: Alle Laborarmaturen sind mit einer Kunststoffbeschichtung zu versehen. Diese Kunststoffbeschichtung muss weitestgehend UV-beständig, griffig, abriebfest, verschmutzungsunempfindlich, in großem Umfang chemisch beständig und bis 120°C temperaturbeständig sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture Construction

description.en: Specifies construction details for furniture bodies and panels.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sight panels/screens must be manufactured like body parts

description.en: Sight panels and sight screens for laboratory furniture must be constructed in the same manner as the body parts of the furniture.
description.original: Sichtblenden sind wie Korpusteile herzustellen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Round corners to 3mm radius

description.en: All corners must be rounded to a radius of 3mm.
description.original: Ecken sind auf 3mm Radius zu runden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: High cabinet cladding includes horizontal top panel for dust protection

description.en: Cladding for high cabinets must include, in addition to the front panel, a horizontal top panel to create a closed area at the top for dust protection.
description.original: Verblendungen bei Hochschränken beinhalten zusätzlich zur vorderen Blende eine waagrechte obere Blende, damit sich ein auch nach oben geschlossener verblendeter Bereich ergibt (Staubschutz).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Edges with durable PP edge protection, thickness >= 2mm for visible edges

description.en: Edges, especially visible edges, must be provided with durable, through-colored PP edge protection that is impact-resistant, UV-resistant, and bonded homogeneously and watertight via gluing or bonding. The thickness of the edge protection for visible edges must be at least 2mm.
description.original: Kanten, insbesondere Sichtkanten, sind mit dauerhaft haltbarem, durchgefärbten Kantenschutz aus PP zu versehen. Dieser Kantenschutz soll schlagfest, UV-beständig und sich mittels Verleimung oder Verklebung homogen und wasserdicht mit der Platte verbinden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wood parts glue class V20

description.en: All wood parts must have glue class V20.
description.original: Verleimung V20

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wood parts coating class 2, thickness >0.14mm

description.en: All wood parts must have coating class 2 with coating thickness greater than 0.14mm.
description.original: Beschichtungsklasse 2, (Beschichtungsstärke >0,14mm)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wood parts abrasion resistance class S

description.en: All wood parts must have abrasion resistance class S.
description.original: Abriebswiderstand S

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Suitable for continuous use

description.en: The extraction arm must be suitable for continuous use.
description.original: Für dauerhaften Einsatz geeignet

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Seal visible ends with matching caps

description.en: Visible ends must be tightly sealed with caps that optically match the equipment.
description.original: Sichtbare Enden sind durch optisch der Einrichtung entsprechende Kappen dicht zu verschließen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hardware

description.en: Specifies hinges, handles, locks, and other hardware components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hinges for wood furniture: single-joint metal, opening angle >= 270°, self-closing, three-dimensionally adjustable

description.en: For wood furniture, single-joint metal hinges must be used with an opening angle of at least 270°, three-dimensionally adjustable, self-closing at angles less than 10°, and holding closed when shut. Hinges must have a minimum opening angle of 270 degrees and be self-closing. The hinges used must allow a door opening angle of 270° and be three-dimensionally adjustable.
description.original: Für Holzmöbel sind Eingelenk-Scharniere aus Metall zu verwenden. Öffnungswinkel mindestens 270°, Scharniere dreidimensional verstellbar, bei einem Winkel kleiner 10 Grad selbstschließend und im geschlossenen Zustand zuhaltend ausgebildet.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hinges with impact dampers for cabinet doors

description.en: Cabinets must be equipped with impact dampers for hinged doors.
description.original: Weiters sind Korpusse mit Anschlagdämpfern bei Flügeltüren auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hinges for chemical cabinets: powder-coated, opening angle 270°

description.en: For chemical cabinets, hinges must be in standard powder-coated execution with an opening angle of 270°.
description.original: Für Chemikalienschränke sind Scharniere in normgerecht pulverlackbeschichteter Ausführung zu verwenden, Öffnungswinkel 270°.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Number of hinges based on door height

description.en: Doors up to 900mm height must have 2 hinges; doors over 900mm height must have 3 hinges.
description.original: Türen bis 900mm Höhe sind mit 2 Scharnieren, Türen über 900mm Höhe sind mit 3 Scharnieren auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Metal handle grips (stainless steel)

description.en: Handle grips must be metal, made of stainless steel, and suitable for cleaning requirements.
description.original: Als Griffelemente der Möbel sind Metallbügelgriffe (Material Edelstahl), welche den Anforderungen der Reinigung entsprechen, zu verwenden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fronts with dampened bump stops

description.en: Fronts must be executed with dampened bump stops (inserted bump stops). Fronts must be executed with drilled-in dampened bump stops.
description.original: Diese sind mittels eingebohrten Anschlagpuffern gedämpft auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Under-counter units with metal bow handles

description.en: Under-counter units must be executed with metal bow handles according to the position descriptions.
description.original: Die Unterbauten sind entsprechend den Positionsbeschreibungen mit Metallbügelgriffen auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Door handle element

description.en: Each door must receive a handle element. Each door must be equipped with at least one handle element.
description.original: Jede Tür erhält ein Griffelement.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wall cabinets with metal bow handles

description.en: Wall cabinets must be equipped with metal bow handles.
description.original: Die Hängeschränke sind mit Metallbügelgriffen auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors with hold-open device

description.en: Doors must be equipped with a hold-open device.
description.original: Türen mit Feststellanlage

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Locks and closures

description.en: Locks and closures must be planned for.
description.original: schlüsse und Verschlüsse einzuplanen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Opening angle 270°

description.en: Doors must have an opening angle of 270°.
description.original: Ausführung zu verwenden, Öffnungswinkel 270°.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors with metal bow handles

description.en: Doors must be executed with metal bow handles. Each door must have one handle element. Handle shells, continuous handle rails, etc. are not permitted for hygienic reasons.
description.original: Türen sind mit Metallbügelgriffen auszuführen. Jede Tür erhält ein Griffelement. Griffmuscheln, durchgängige Griffschienen etc. sind aus hygienischen Gründen nicht zulässig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Door holding open device

description.en: Cabinet must be equipped with a holding open device to lock doors in open position.
description.original: Schrank ausgestattet mit Feststellanlage zum Arretieren der Türen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Lockable lever handle with 2-point locking

description.en: Opening and closing of doors must be via a lockable lever handle with 2-point locking.
description.original: Das Öffnen und Schliessen der Türen muss über einen versperrbaren Hebelgriff mit 2-Punkt-Verriegelung erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hinges based on door height with specific opening angle and locking

description.en: Doors up to 900mm height must have 2 hinges; doors over 900mm must have 3 hinges. Hinges must have an opening angle of at least 270 degrees, be self-closing, and have three-point locking.
description.original: Türen bis 900mm Höhe sind mit 2 Scharnieren, Türen über 900mm Höhe sind mit 3 Scharnieren auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cylinder locks with 3 keys for doors and drawers

description.en: Where required in the bill of quantities, doors and individual drawers must be lockable with cylinder locks, each supplied with 3 keys.
description.original: Soweit im LV gefordert, sind Türen und Einzelladen durch Zylinderschlösser mit je 3 Stk. Eigenschlüssel sperrbar zu machen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Lock type based on door height with turnbuckle specifications

description.en: Doors up to 900mm height must have a cylinder backing lock; doors over 900mm must have a cylinder object turnbuckle lock, usable left and right. The turnbuckle must have a diameter of 8mm. The turn knob and cylinder must be replaceable.
description.original: Türen bis 900mm Höhe mit Zylinder-Hinterlegschloss, Türen über 900mm Höhe mit Zylinder-Objekt-Drehstangen-Schloss, links und rechts einsetzbar;

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Same key for all lockable elements in one cabinet

description.en: If cabinets or drawers are lockable, all elements in one cabinet must be lockable with the same key.
description.original: Werden Schränke oder Laden absperrbar ausgeführt, so sind sämtliche Elemente in einem Korpus mit dem gleichen Schlüssel sperrbar auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Retrofitting locks possible later

description.en: It must be possible to retrofit locks on cabinets at a later date.
description.original: Es muss die Möglichkeit bestehen, Schränke auch zu einem späteren Zeitpunkt mit Schlössern nachzurüsten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Central locking for under-counter drawers

description.en: For under-counter units with drawers, locking can be central for all drawers.
description.original: Bei Unterbauten mit Laden kann die Versperrbarkeit zentral für alle Laden erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Labeling

description.en: Specifies labeling requirements for cabinets and components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Possibility for interchangeable labeling

description.en: It must be possible to attach interchangeable labels (cards, strips, etc.).
description.original: Die Möglichkeit der Anbringung von wechselbaren Beschriftungen (Kärtchen, Streifen, etc.) muss gegeben sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets, shelves, and undercounter units with labeling fields

description.en: Undercounter units, wall cabinets, hanging shelves, and cabinets/shelves must be provided with labeling fields. The labeling fields consist of a holder into which a marking or paper strip can be inserted, covered with a fixed clear film.
description.original: Die Unterbauten sind mit Beschriftungsfeldern zu versehen. Die Beschriftungsfelder bestehen aus einer Halterung, in die eine Kennzeichnung eingeschoben werden kann, die mit einer festen Klarsichtfolie abgedeckt wird.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Labeling sticker for radioactive content

description.en: Each collection container must include a sticker for marking as radioactive.
description.original: inkl. Aufkleber zur Kennzeichnung – Radioaktiv.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Labeling in German according to DIN EN 13 792

description.en: Labeling must be in German, media designation according to DIN EN 13 792.
description.original: Beschriftung in deutscher Sprache, Medienbezeichnung gemäß DIN EN 13 792.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Workstations and Tables

description.en: Specifies requirements for tables, frames, and workstations.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Utensilienauszug for writing workstations

description.en: For base units at writing workstations, an additional utensil drawer may be required.
description.original: Für Unterbauten bei Schreibarbeitsplätzen kann zusätzlich ein Utensilienauszug erforderlich sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Support frame definition

description.en: Support frames are all parts that serve the stable construction of work tables.
description.original: Als Traggestelle werden alle Teile bezeichnet, die der stabilen Bauweise von Arbeitstischen dienen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table types: wall-mounted, freestanding, or island

description.en: Laboratory tables can be wall-mounted, freestanding, or used as island tables.
description.original: Als Labortische werden alle Arbeitsflächen bezeichnet, die entweder wandstehend, freistehend oder als Mitteltische nutzbar sind.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Work height for standing workplaces: 900 mm

description.en: Work height for standing workplaces must be 900 mm.
description.original: Die Arbeitshöhen sind mit 900mm für Steharbeitsplätze einzuhalten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Work height for sitting workplaces: 720-750 mm

description.en: Work height for sitting workplaces must be 720-750 mm.
description.original: bzw. mit 720-750mm für Sitzarbeitsplätze einzuhalten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Special tables with other heights per specification

description.en: Special tables with other heights are defined in the performance specification.
description.original: Sondertische mit anderen Höhenmaßen ergeben sich aus der Leistungsbeschreibung.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Standard system holes and connection options

description.en: Frames must have system-compatible standard holes and connection options.
description.original: verfügen über systemgerechte Normbohrungen und Verbindungsmöglichkeiten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Different frame shapes per application

description.en: Frames have different shapes depending on the application.
description.original: und haben je nach Einsatz unterschiedliche Form.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Writing workplaces with C-foot frames

description.en: Writing workplaces must generally have C-foot frames.
description.original: Schreibarbeitsplätze sind generell mit C-Fußgestellen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Workstations/tables with four-leg frames and associated components

description.en: Provide workstations or tables with four-leg frames. The upright elements must include an upper cross connection with holes for tabletop fastening, fastening elements for longitudinal traverses, and locking screws. Longitudinal traverses must be fabricated at the top front and back. An additional cross traverse must be realized at the lower back area. For roll-in understructures, stop brackets must be installed at the upper back to ensure a uniform front appearance of the tables.
description.original: Arbeitsplätze bzw. Tische mit Vier-Fußgestellen aus zuführen. Die Standelemente sind mit oberer Querverbindung einschließlich Bohrungen für Tischplattenbefestigung, Befestigungselementen für Längstraversen und Sicherungsschrauben zu versehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Leveling devices on all frames

description.en: All frames must be equipped with leveling devices that serve weight absorption and compensate for floor unevenness.
description.original: Alle Gestelle sind mit Nivelliereinrichtungen (siehe oben) zu versehen, die einerseits der Gewichtsaufnahme dienen und andererseits Bodenunebenheiten ausgleichen sollen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimum number of upright elements for flexibility

description.en: The support frames must be designed so that at the prescribed load capacity, the number of upright elements is minimized, allowing high flexibility in the arrangement of under-counter cabinets.
description.original: Weiters sind die Traggestelle so auszuführen, dass bei vorgeschriebener Tragfähigkeit die Anzahl der Standelemente ein Minimum beträgt, sodass bei der Anordnung der Unterschränke ein hohes Maß an Flexibilität gegeben ist.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Mobile work tables on 4 double swivel casters with stable fully welded 4-leg steel frame

description.en: Mobile work tables must be on 4 double swivel casters and have a stable support structure made of a completely welded 4-leg steel frame, including 3 lower traverses.
description.original: Mobile Arbeitstische: Mobile Arbeitstische auf 4 Stk. Doppellenkrollen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 4 polyamide plain bearing double rollers, Ø approx. 80 mm

description.en: The mobile work table must have 4 polyamide plain bearing double rollers, diameter approx. 80 mm, with polyurethane tread, 2 rollers lockable, load capacity per roller at least 110 kg.
description.original: 4 Stk. Gleitlager-Doppelrollen aus Polyamid, Ø ca. 80 mm, mit Polyurethan-Bereifung, 2 Rollen feststellbar, Tragkraft pro Rolle mind. 110kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tabletop material as per 'Tabletop' item

description.en: The tabletop material must be as specified in the 'Tabletop' item.
description.original: Tischplatte (Material entsprechend Position 'Tischplatte' bzw.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware tabletops for views A, B, and C

description.en: Stoneware tabletops are required for various views: 6.0 linear meters for view A, 6.70 lfm for view A (L-shape) and B&C (middle workbench), and 7.7 lfm for views A and C.
description.original: Tischplatte Steinzeug GU.25.03.03.01 EUR PP EUR EP EUR SO EUR LM 6,00 LO Ansicht A

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Load Capacity

description.en: Specifies minimum load capacities for various components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimum load capacity of support frame: 200 kg

description.en: The support frame must have a minimum load capacity of 200 kg.
description.original: Tragfähigkeit des Traggestells mind. 200kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimum load capacity of mobile work table: 150 kg

description.en: The mobile work table must have a minimum load capacity of 150 kg.
description.original: Tragfähigkeit des Arbeitstisches mind. 150kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelf surface load capacity: 30 kg

description.en: The surface load capacity of all shelves must be at least 30 kg.
description.original: Die Flächentragfähigkeit aller Fachböden beträgt mindestens 30kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelf support load capacity minimum 50 kg

description.en: Each shelf support must have a minimum load capacity of 50 kg.
description.original: Die Belastbarkeit eines jeden Fachbodenträgers ist mindestens 50kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawer minimum load capacity 30kg

description.en: Drawers or pull-outs must have a minimum load capacity of approximately 30kg. Deviating load capacities are explicitly mentioned in the individual text.
description.original: Auszüge oder Schubladen besitzen eine Belastbarkeit von minimal ca. 30kg. Abweichende Belastbarkeiten sind explizit im Einzeltext erwähnt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimum load capacity per roller

description.en: Each roller must have a minimum load capacity of 70 kg.
description.original: Die Tragkraft einer Rolle muss mindestens 70kg betragen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plate thickness to ensure safe placement of specified equipment

description.en: The plate thickness must be dimensioned so that the specified equipment can be safely placed on it; if necessary, frame constructions are to be included.
description.original: Die Plattenstärke ist so zu bemessen, dass die angeführten Geräte sicher darauf aufgestellt werden können, ggf. erforderliche Rahmenkonstruktionen sind in den Positionen Übertrag EUR Planungsgruppe Grünbichler GmbH, Wienerstraße 45a, 8605 Kapfenberg, +43 (3862) 28088 Seite 22 von 409

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelf load capacity at least 70 kg

description.en: Each shelf must have a load capacity of at least 70 kg.
description.original: Tragkraft je Fachboden mind. 70kg

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Boom with 50 kg load capacity

description.en: The boom must have a load capacity of 50 kg.
description.original: Ausleger mit 50kg Tragkraft

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Structural Requirements

description.en: Specifies structural and load-bearing requirements for boards and panels.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Board thickness and cross-sections must meet load-bearing requirements per standard and laboratory loads

description.en: The board thickness and cross-sections must comply with load-bearing capacity requirements according to the relevant standard and correspond to usual loads of a laboratory operation.
description.original: Die Plattenstärke (Dicke) muss den Anforderungen an die Tragfähigkeit (gemäß Norm) entsprechen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture Components

description.en: Specifications for castors, frames, and other furniture parts.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Polyurethane castors, 2 lockable, min 110 kg load capacity each

description.en: The table must have polyurethane castors, with 2 lockable castors, each with a minimum load capacity of 110 kg.
description.original: mit Polyurethan- Bereifung, 2 Rollen feststellbar, Tragkraft pro Rolle mind. 110kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Work table without castors: leveling four-leg frame

description.en: The work table without castors must have a leveling four-leg frame.
description.original: Arbeitstisch (ohne Rollen): Arbeitstisch auf nivellierbarem Vier-Fußgestell.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Construction

description.en: Structural requirements for tables, cabinets, and fume hoods.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table support structure: table top on two continuous metal traverses with fully welded 4-leg steel frame

description.en: The table top must be mounted on two continuous metal traverses, and the table must have a stable support structure made from a completely welded 4-leg steel frame.
description.original: auf zwei durchgehenden Metalltraversen montiert.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet construction: body with side panels, bottom, traverses, shelves, dowelled and glued

description.en: The cabinet body consists of 2 side panels, a lower bottom, 2 upper traverses, and height-adjustable shelves. The cabinet parts must be permanently dowelled and glued.
description.original: Der Korpus besteht aus 2 Seitenteilen, einem unteren Boden, 2 oberen Traversen und höhenverstellbaren Fachböden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table fume hood with self-supporting base or steel frame and top section components

description.en: The table fume hood must consist of a self-supporting base or a load-bearing steel frame and a top section. The fume hood top section must consist of two side walls, a back wall, a front panel, a fixed window, and a one-piece front sash.
description.original: Der Tischabzug besteht aus einem selbsttragenden Unterbau oder einem tragenden Stahlgestell und einem Oberteil.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Walk-in fume hood construction with side posts, back wall, front panel, fixed window, and two front sliders

description.en: The walk-in fume hood consists of two equally wide side posts, a back wall, a front panel, a fixed window, and two one-piece front sliders.
description.original: Der begehbare Abzug besteht aus zwei gleich breiten Seitenpfosten, einer Rückwand, einer Frontblende, einem feststehenden Fenster und zwei einteiligen Frontschiebern.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Frame construction

description.en: Frame construction design.
description.original: Ständerbauweise

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Internal parallelogram support frame with spring assistance

description.en: The arm must have an internal parallelogram support frame with spring assistance.
description.original: Innenliegendes Parallelogramm-Trägergestänge mit Federunterstützung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media Cells and Wings

description.en: Specifications for modular media supply units and suspended media wings.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells as modular, expandable, and configurable energy supply units

description.en: Media cells must be designed as floor-standing energy supply and disposal units in modular form, consisting of various combinable assemblies. They can be wall-standing or freestanding modules for accommodating media lines or for back or intermediate installation of work tables. The cells must be made of metal (steel/aluminum) upright profiles with a height of approx. 250 cm and appropriate cross-section, coated and suitable for attaching fittings, media channels, tables, wall cabinets, shelves, hanging cabinets, and accessories. They must be designed for later expansion, conversion, or removal by the operator. For horizontal piping in the under-counter area, height must be adjusted to table height. The stands must include a media support grid for fastening media base pipes and a stand base foot element. Above the tabletop, the cell stands must accommodate the media panel (splash guard below media channel), media channel, splash guard above media channel, shelves, hanging cabinets, and stand extensions up to ceiling anchoring. Media cells must be equipped with removable, possibly sliding front panels; for freestanding modules, panels must be removable on both sides. Additionally, media cells must be equipped with laterally sliding media covers in the under-counter area.
description.original: Medienzellen (Energiezellen) sind wandstehende oder freistehende Module, die der Aufnahme von Medienleitungen bzw. dem Hinter- oder Zwischenbau von Arbeitstischen dienen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cell for wall workbench: modular and expandable

description.en: Media cell for wall workbench must be modular and allow future expansion for add-ons. Quantity specified in bill of quantities in linear meters.
description.original: Medienzelle für Wandarbeitstisch: Analog zu oben, Möglichkeit zur Erweiterung für Aufbauten. Modularer Aufbau. Angabe im LV in laufmeterspezifischer Stückzahl.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cell for double workbench: modular, no mandatory split

description.en: Media cell for double workbench must be modular. A split into two separate media cells is not required by default. If subsequent splitting is needed, it is specified in individual items (execution with two separate media cells).
description.original: Medienzelle für Doppelarbeitstisch: Analog zu oben. Grundsätzlich ist eine Teilung in zwei getrennte Medienzellen nicht gefordert. Soll die Möglichkeit zur nachträglichen Teilung in zwei separate Wandarbeitszeilen erforderlich sein, so ist dies bei den einzelnen Positionen angeführt (Ausführung mit zwei getrennten Medienzellen). Modularer Aufbau.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipe separators part of media cell

description.en: The pipe separators are part of the media cell and are not separately listed in the performance list.
description.original: Die Rohrtrenner sind Bestandteil der Medienzelle und sind in der Leistungsaufstellung nicht extra ausgewiesen!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 2.6 lfm H75 media cell

description.en: Provide a 2.6 linear meter H75 media cell.
description.original: 2,6lfm H75 Medienzelle

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 2.6 lfm media cell for cold water

description.en: Provide a 2.6 linear meter media cell for cold water.
description.original: 2,6lfm Medienzelle für KW

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cell [E] 2.8 lfm

description.en: One media cell [E] of 2.8 lfm must include connections for cold water, 1x nitrogen, 1x argon, 1x oxygen, 1x compressed air; a 2.8 lfm media channel with 6x 230V, 1x DD RJ45; and 2.8 lfm glass shelves.
description.original: [E], bestehend aus: Medienzelle 2,8lfm für KW, 1x N2, 1x Ar, 1x O2, 1x DL Medienkanal 2,8lfm inkl. 6x 230V, 1x DD RJ45 Glastablar 2,8lfm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media wings suspended from ceiling with visual and technical conformity

description.en: Media wings (supply systems for electrical, sanitary, and gas) must be suspended from the ceiling using suitable constructions, ensuring maximum flexibility in arrangement of equipment and tables on the floor. They must be visually matched to other media supply systems and technically executed analogously.
description.original: Medienflügel: Diese Positionen beschreiben Medienversorgungssysteme (für Elektro-, Sanitär- und Gasversorgung) welche über geeignete Konstruktionen von der Decke abzuhängen sind und somit der Medienversorgung unter Einhaltung größtmöglicher Flexibilität bzgl. Der Anordnung von Geräten und Tischen am Boden diesen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media wing G2.11.02.01.02 and G2.11.02.01.03 specifications

description.en: Media wing G2.11.02.01.02 must include 12x 230V, 1x DD RJ45, preparation for 1x each DL, N2, O2, H2, and 1x cooling water supply and return with fittings. Media wing G2.11.02.01.03 must include 12x 230V, 1x DD RJ45, preparation for 1x each DL, Ar, O2, 1x cooling water supply and return with fittings, and drainage via pump module.
description.original: 12x 230V, 1x DD RJ45, vorbereitet für je 1x DL, N2, O2, H2, 1x KüW-VL, -RL (inkl. KüW- Armaturen)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cladding and Media Outlets

description.en: Requirements for cladding panels and media outlet placement.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cladding for fixed steel table frames

description.en: Cladding for fixed steel table frames must be executed consisting of approximately... (text cut off).
description.original: Ausführung der Verblendungen bei fest angebauten Stahltischgestellen bestehend aus einem ca.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cladding for fixed steel table frames

description.en: Cladding for fixed steel table frames must consist of an approximately 200 mm high base and a 4 mm MDF board in plastic profiles that can be moved.
description.original: Ausführung der Verblendungen bei fest angebauten Stahltischgestellen bestehend aus einem ca. 200 mm hohem Sockel und 4 mm MDF-Platte, in Kunststoffprofilen, die verschoben werden kann

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cladding for freestanding cells/console version

description.en: For freestanding cells or console version, use 16 mm thick chipboard coated on both sides, with a base profile in the lower area.
description.original: bei freistehenden Zellen / Konsolausführung 16 mm dicke, beidseitig beschichtete Spanplatte, im unteren Bereich als Sockelprofil ausgebildet

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media outlets: mountable in large numbers and easily accessible

description.en: Media outlets should be mountable in large numbers and in any arrangement, and be easily accessible.
description.original: Medienauslässe sollen in großer Anzahl und in beliebiger Anordnung montierbar und leicht zugänglich sein

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas and liquid outlets allowed in media cell cladding

description.en: Arrangement of extraction points for gases and liquids in the media cell cladding is permitted.
description.original: Die Anordnung von Entnahmestellen für Gase und Flüssigkeiten in der Medienzellenblende ist zulässig

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cladding above work surfaces up to media channel height, with exception for sink areas

description.en: Above work surfaces, media cells must be clad at least up to the height of the media channel (or the lowest shelf). In sink areas of wall work rows, media cells are only to be executed up to the height of the top edge of the media channel.
description.original: Oberhalb der Arbeitsflächen sind Medienzellen mindestens bis zur Höhe des Medienkanals (bzw. des untersten Tablars) zu verblenden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No power sockets in media cell cladding

description.en: Sockets for power and low-voltage (230V, 400V, IT) are not permitted in the media cell cladding.
description.original: nicht jedoch Steckdosen für Stark- und Schwachstrom (230V, 400V, EDV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Horizontal cladding to wall above sink area

description.en: In the sink area, an upper horizontal cladding to the wall must be executed.
description.original: In diesem Bereich ist eine obere waagrechte Verblendung zur Wand auszuführen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table Tops and Worktops

description.en: Specifications for various table top materials, edges, and finishes.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table tops: general requirements

description.en: Table tops must be designed for highest demands and executed in uniform thickness using commercially available materials. Table tops without edge bead must have an impact-resistant rounded safety edge and a total thickness of at least 28 mm. Table tops with edge bead must have an additional minimum 7 mm edge bead, resulting in a total thickness at the edge of at least 35 mm. If edges (with or without bead) are made of different materials, they must bond homogeneously and watertight.
description.original: Tischplatten sind grundsätzlich für höchste Ansprüche geeignet vorzusehen und in einheitlicher Dicke auszuführen; es sind handelsübliche Materialien zu verwenden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware table tops

description.en: Stoneware table tops are specified. Supply and install stoneware table tops: 7.70 lfm for views A and B; 36.80 linear meters for views A, B&C (middle workbench), D&E (middle workbench), F&G (middle workbench), H.
description.original: Steinzeug-Tischplatten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Phenolic resin solid core table top

description.en: Supply and install a phenolic resin solid core table top, view I, 9.60 linear meters.
description.original: Tischplatte Phenolharz-Vollkern G3.21.03.02.01 EUR PP EUR EP EUR SO EUR LM 9,60 LO Ansicht I

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Standard tabletops: melamine resin laminated boards with HPL covering and edge details

description.en: Standard tabletops consist of a carrier board (approx. 28mm thick flat pressed board per DIN 68 761), glued V20, emission class E1. The work surface must be covered with at least 0.8mm high-pressure laminate (HPL). Side and front edges must be covered with approx. 3mm thick polypropylene. The corners of the tabletops must be rounded to a 3mm radius. The rear longitudinal edge (only in combination with sealing to media carriers) must be finished with a 0.4mm melamine resin edge. The underside must be provided with at least 0.03mm synthetic resin foil. Top and bottom sides must be water and heat resistant glued to the carrier board.
description.original: Standardtischplatten: Melaminharz-Schichtplatten bestehen aus einer Trägerplatte (ca. 28mm dicke Flachpressplatte nach DIN 68 761), Verleimung V20, Emissionsklasse E1.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Special tabletops: polypropylene boards with welded edges and moisture protection

description.en: Tabletops for special applications: boards made of polypropylene, with a chipboard carrier approx. 25mm thick. Work surface covering and edge banding must be made of approx. 6mm thick PP, welded and glued with special adhesive and primer on the base plate. The edge profile must be flush or with a bead edge and formed as a drip nose on the underside. The underside of the base plate must be executed with a melamine resin coated counter material to protect against moisture. Corner formations must be welded and all weld seams ground clean on the surface.
description.original: Tischplatten für besondere Anwendungsbereiche: Platten aus Polypropylen: Die Tischplatten bestehen aus einer Spanplatten-Trägerplatte, ca. 25mm dick.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Vertical cladding for height differences

description.en: Provide vertical cladding made of tabletop material for height differences, not separately listed in the specification.
description.original: Höhensprüngen ist eine senkrechte Verblendung aus Tischplattenmaterial vorzusehen, diese ist in der Leistungsbeschreibung nicht extra ausgewiesen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Phenolic resin solid core tabletops

description.en: Tabletop type G2.11.03.02.01 must be made of phenolic resin solid core, length 3.00 LO [C]. Provide 24.00 lfm of phenolic resin solid core tabletop for views B, C, D, E, F, G. Tabletop made of phenolic resin solid core, 4.80 lfm, for view A.
description.original: Tischplatte Phenolharz-Vollkern G2.11.03.02.01 EUR PP EUR EP EUR SO EUR LM 3,00 LO [C]

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware tabletops

description.en: Tabletop type G2.11.03.03.01 must be made of stoneware, length 8.10 LO, views A, B, F. Provide 5.40 lfm of stoneware tabletop for view A. Tabletop made of stoneware, 5.10 lfm, for views B and C (middle workbench).
description.original: Tischplatte Steinzeug G2.11.03.03.01 EUR PP EUR EP EUR SO EUR LM 8,10 LO Ansicht A, B, F

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Reinforcement with proven backing material

description.en: The reinforcement must be executed with proven backing material.
description.original: mit belegten Gegenzugmaterial ausgeführt sein

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Corner formations welded

description.en: Corner formations must be welded.
description.original: Eckausbildungen sind zu verschweißen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Weld seams ground smooth

description.en: All weld seams must be ground smooth on the surface.
description.original: Alle Schweißnähte sind an der Oberfläche sauber zu verschleifen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plates according to DIN 12 916

description.en: Plates must be manufactured according to DIN 12 916 from self-supporting, acid-resistant, glazed stoneware according to DIN 28 062 - section 1.1.4.
description.original: Die Platten sind nach DIN 12 916 aus selbsttragendem, säurefesten, glasierten Steinzeug nach DIN 28 062 - Ziffer 1.1.4 zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Physical properties per DECHEMA group 71

description.en: Physical properties must comply with DECHEMA material table group 71, sheets 1 and 2.
description.original: physikalische Eigenschaften gem. DECHEMA- Werkstofftabelle Gruppe 71, Blatt 1 und 2.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with ÖNORM for alternating temperature resistance of materials (28 062)

description.en: The tender requires compliance with ÖNORM standard 28 062 for alternating temperature resistance of materials.
description.original: 28 062 Wechseltemperaturbeständigkeit von Materialien

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with ÖNORM for UV resistance of materials (53 389)

description.en: The tender requires compliance with ÖNORM standard 53 389 for UV resistance of materials. Materials must be UV-resistant.
description.original: 53 389 UV-Beständigkeit von Materialien

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table edge with continuous bead

description.en: Table closing edges (including stoneware composite table tops) must be executed with a continuous bead edge seamlessly connected to the plate.
description.original: Die Tischabschlusskanten sind mit umlaufendem Wulstrand auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Front edge with upper chamfer and drip groove on underside

description.en: The front edge must be executed with an upper chamfer and a drip groove on the underside.
description.original: Ausführung der Frontkante mit oberer Abfasung und Tropfnut an der Unterseite.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tabletop edges must have approx. 3 mm rounding

description.en: The edges of the tabletops must have a rounding of approx. 3 mm.
description.original: Die Kanten der Tischplatten müssen mit einer Rundung von ca. 3 mm versehen sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cutouts for under-counter basins glazed

description.en: Plate cutouts for under-counter basins must be smooth glazed.
description.original: Die Plattenausschnitte für Unterbaubecken müssen glatt glasiert sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware composite table top construction

description.en: Stoneware composite table tops: a carrier plate of 22mm flat press plate with melamine resin surface must be covered on the top with at least 8mm thick Keraion ceramic plates and permanently bonded.
description.original: Steinzeug-Verbund-Tischplatten: Eine Trägerplatte aus 22mm Flachpressplatte mit Melaminharzoberfläche ist an der Oberseite mit mind. 8mm dicken Keraion-Keramikplatten zu belegen und dauerhaft zu verbinden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Phenolic resin core plates reference product

description.en: Plate material must be phenolic resin core. The material for these worktops must be the product 'TopLab Plus' (Trespa), or equivalent. Phenolic resin core plates: reference product Trespa TopLab Plus, or equivalent.
description.original: Phenolharz-Vollkernplatten: Richtfabrikat Trespa TopLab Plus, oder gleichwertig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Worktop for chemical and bio use

description.en: Worktop must be suitable for chemical and biological use.
description.original: Arbeitsplatte für chemische, bio

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Phenolic resin solid core panel material

description.en: The worktop material must be a phenolic resin solid core panel suitable for chemical, biological, and physical laboratories.
description.original: Plattenmaterial Phenolharz-Vollkern - Arbeitsplatte für chemische, biologische und physikalische Labors.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware laboratory worktop

description.en: The worktop must be made of stoneware (Steinzeug) as specified, specifically for the laboratory worktop in room 3.OG.19 (12.12) for chemistry practicals.
description.original: Tischplatte Steinzeug

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Decorative surface with high-density structure and 24-hour chemical resistance

description.en: The decorative surface must have a high-density surface structure and 24-hour chemical resistance against concentrated acids and dyes.
description.original: Dekor-Oberfläche mit hochverdichteter Oberflächenstruktur und 24-Stunden Chemikalien-Beständigkeit gegen konzentrierte Säuren und Farbstoffe.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Scratch resistance equal to or greater than 4 Newton per EN 438-2:14

description.en: The degree of scratch resistance must be equal to or greater than 4 Newton according to EN 438-2:14.
description.original: Der Grad der Kratzfestigkeit ist gleich oder größer 4 Newton nach EN 438-2:14.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Panel core based on resin-reinforced cellulose fibers with black edge

description.en: The panel core must be based on resin-reinforced cellulose fibers and have a black edge.
description.original: Der Plattenkern basiert auf mit Harz verstärkten Zellulose-Fasern und weist eine schwarze Kante auf.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No perceptible staining, gloss loss, or surface change after 24-hour exposure to specified chemicals

description.en: No perceptible staining, gloss loss, or change to the worktop surface after 24-hour exposure to hydrochloric acid (37%), sulfuric acid (33%), nitric acid (30%), phosphoric acid (85%), acetic acid (99%), chromic acid (60%), sodium chloride (10%), formaldehyde (37%), acetone, or ethyl alcohol.
description.original: Keine wahrnehmbare Fleckenbildung, kein Glanzverlust, bzw. keine Änderung an der Arbeitsplattenoberfläche nach 24-stündiger Einwirkung von Salzsäure (37%).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plate joints must be wedge connection

description.en: The plate joints must be executed as a wedge connection (safety against chipping).
description.original: Die Plattenstöße sind als Keilverbindung auszuführen (Sicherheit gegen Absplittern).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Seal wedge joint permanently with suitable sealant

description.en: The wedge joint must be permanently sealed with a suitable sealant.
description.original: Die Keilfuge ist mit einem geeigneten Dichtmittel dauerhaft zu versiegeln.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: If tabletop has rolled edge, it must be made of epoxy resin and seamlessly bonded

description.en: If these tabletops are executed with a rolled edge, it must be made of epoxy resin and seamlessly connected to the tabletop. Screwed-on rolled edges are not permitted.
description.original: Bei Ausführung dieser Tischplatten mit Wulstrand ist dieser aus Epoxidharz gefertigt fugenlos mit der Tischplatte verbunden auszuführen. Aufgeschraubte Wulstränder sind nicht zulässig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tabletop made of solid beech wood

description.en: Tabletop must be made of solid beech wood: solid beech wood panels from approx. 50 mm wide strips, finger-jointed and glued, with a thickness of 30 mm.
description.original: Tischplatte aus Buche - massiv: Buchemassivholzplatten aus ca. 50 mm breiten Riemen, keilverzinkt verleimt, mit einer Dicke von 30 mm.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets and Undercounter Units

description.en: Specifications for cabinet construction, doors, drawers, and bases.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Undercounter cabinets: variants with fixed base, mobile on rollers, or insert variant

description.en: The undercounter cabinets must be designed as a variant with fixed base, mobile on 4 rollers, or as an insert variant (2 rollers, 3-sided base) according to position descriptions.
description.original: Die Unterbauten sind entsprechend den Positionsbeschreibungen als Variante mit fixem Sockel, fahrbar auf 4 Stk. Rollen oder als Einschubvariante (zwei Stk. Rollen, 3-seitiger Sockel) zu gestalten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Ventilated cabinet with shelves and drip tray

description.en: Cabinet must be ventilated, with height-adjustable shelves secured against accidental removal and a drip tray.
description.original: Belüfteter Schrank mit schalenförmigen, höhenverstellbaren, gegen unbeabsichtigtes Herausziehen gesicherten Einlegeböden und Auffangwanne

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets with hinged doors

description.en: Cabinets must have hinged doors.
description.original: Schränke mit Flügeltüren

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets with drawers if specified

description.en: If specified in the performance description, cabinets must be supplied with drawers.
description.original: Ggf. sind diese Schränke mit Schubladen zu liefern (siehe Leistungsbeschreibung)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Safety cell G90 design

description.en: Cabinets must be designed as safety cell G90.
description.original: Die Schränke müssen als Sicherheitszelle G90 ausgelegt sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipe penetrations for gas and signal lines

description.en: Per cylinder position, provide at least two pipe penetrations for gas lines and one for signal lines in the cabinet ceiling.
description.original: Pro Flaschenstellplatz sind mindestens zwei Rohrdurchführungen für Gasleitungen und eine entsprechende Durchführung für Signalleitungen in der Schrankdecke vorzusehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Höhenraster kompatibel zu Schrankausführungen

description.en: The height grids of the individual designs must be compatible with each other and with the cabinet designs.
description.original: Die Höhenraster der einzelnen Ausführungen müssen in sich und zu den Schrankausführungen kompatibel sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Korpusteile unlösbar verdübeln und verleimen

description.en: The cabinet body parts must be permanently doweled and glued.
description.original: Die Korpusteile sind unlösbar zu verdübeln und zu verleimen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connect sub-elements with fittings and eccentric screws

description.en: The sub-elements must be connected using fittings and eccentric screws.
description.original: Die Teilelemente werden mit Beschlägen und Exzenterschrauben verbunden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Body parts connected with detachable fittings and glued dowels

description.en: The body parts must be connected using detachable fittings and dowels glued on one side in the bottom.
description.original: Die Korpusteile sind, über lösbare Beschläge und einseitig im Boden verleimte Dübel zu verbinden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fronts to be manufactured in body quality

description.en: Fronts must be manufactured in the same quality as the body.
description.original: Die Fronten sind in Korpusqualität zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Under-counter units with hinged doors: left or right opening possible

description.en: For under-counter units with single-leaf doors, the doors should be able to be hinged on the left or right as desired.
description.original: Bei Unterbauten mit Drehtüren sollen die Türen bei einflügeliger Bauweise wahlweise links oder rechts angeschlagen werden können.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wall cabinets with hinged doors: left or right opening possible

description.en: For wall cabinets with hinged doors, single-leaf doors should be able to be hinged left or right as desired.
description.original: Bei Hängekästen mit Drehtüren sollen die Türen bei einflügeliger Bauweise wahlweise links oder rechts angeschlagen werden können.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Double doors: one side with dust strip
